chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-214 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of MA No.1333/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 02-11-2022 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Siddiqui advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing at some length does not press this petition and submits that the trial Court viz. Senior Civil Judge, Mirpurkhas may be directed to expedite the matter and decide it within a period of three months. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh has no objection to this proposal. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed along with listed application as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to expedite the proceedings of the suit and decide within a period of three months. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
